title: Create Decoration Casing
description: Create Decoration Casing is a mod that adds lots of block variants for minecraft and create mod casings to make buildings and decorations with this block and make wonderful builder and factory and Roleplay city
body:
Create Decoration Casing

Create Decoration Casing is a mod that adds lots of block variants for minecraft and create mod casings to make buildings and decorations with this block and make wonderful builder and factory and Roleplay city

Small information: Currently connect textures are not supported and will be supported when the CTM mod will be released in 1.19 But in 1.18 is supported
